steps.t: The lizard-food can be found at The Drowned Deep, west of Hulwul-nefekh. Gyrgir says that a powerful lizard, Stonecrest, often feeds on grodbog-corpse…
Gyrgir is in Hulwul-nefekh, east of The Drowned Deep. Gyrgir will be pleased to know his poison worked and that Stonecrest will devour no more dwarves…
